name: RPlog_talk_Exercise_on_Caspar
title: Talk Page: Title Inaccurate and Duplicate Log
summary: This is an out-of-character wiki talk page for the Exercise on Caspar log. Mahon argues the log is misnamed, since its contents depict an actual Imperial-versus-New-Republic skirmish that does not take place on Caspar or in CDU space. Danik Kreldin identifies it as a duplicate of the previously posted Mission to Forlec log and proposes deleting this copy and redirecting the link, to which Mahon agrees. The discussion is entirely editorial housekeeping with no in-character content.
